description_long: This is a compact, industrial-style desk lamp featuring a conical metallic shade with a warm copper finish. The lamp has an articulated arm and a round, sturdy black base, allowing for adjustable positioning of the light. The shade is smooth and reflective, contrasting with the matte, slightly textured finish of the base and arm. A visible braided power cord extends from the base, adding a touch of vintage character. The lamp's joints and hardware are minimalistic, emphasizing function over ornamentation. Its overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for modern urban interiors or workspaces.
description: A small, industrial desk lamp with a copper conical shade, black articulated arm, and round base, featuring a visible braided power cord.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled arm, copper shade, and round black base with the cord trailing left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical conical shade and centered base, with the cord extending forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lamp's arm and shade from the right, with the cord trailing right.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the conical shade and the round base, with minimal cord visible.
